translations.en: a figure covered from head to toe with flour.
translations.zh: 一個從頭到腳沾滿麵粉的人。

translations.en: "Ach, I'd like to talk with ya, but I've no time!"
translations.zh: 「哎呀，在下很想與汝攀談，但實在沒空！」

translations.en: "Come see me at my gristmill some other time."
translations.zh: 「改日來在下的磨坊找在下吧。」

translations.en: "'Tis hard work, but it gives me plenty of time to talk!"
translations.zh: 「是份辛苦的活，但倒是給在下大把時間聊天！」

translations.en: "Hrmph... ptuh... hello again."
"Ptuh... ptuh... hello."
"Grison Fairfleth, at your service."
"You can call me 'Gris' if ya prefer."
"As you can see, I turn @grain into @flour."
translations.zh: 「如汝所見，在下把@穀物磨成@麵粉。」

translations.en: "It's a pretty demanding job...and a bit messy too."
translations.zh: 「這是份相當繁重的活……而且有點髒。」

translations.en: "He's a good fellow. I grew up with him."
translations.zh: 「他是個好人，在下和他是從小一起長大的。」

translations.en: "Yep. We were mates." He continues to wipe the dust from his eyes.
translations.zh: 「是的，我們是舊識。」他繼續擦拭眼中的粉塵。

translations.en: "Shorty, ya mean? He's got a fair temper, I'll tell you that!"
translations.zh: 「矮冬瓜？他脾氣可不小，在下可以告訴汝！」

translations.en: "She's one with a nose to the air instead of the grindstone." He chuckles to himself.
translations.zh: 「她是個眼高手低之人，鼻孔朝天而非俯向磨石。」他自個兒暗自發笑。
translations.note: nose to the grindstone=埋頭苦幹，反其道而行

translations.en: "Scared of his own shadow, he is."
"She's baked many a pie with my flour."
translations.zh: 「她用在下的麵粉烤了不少派。」

translations.en: "Meri the wisp, eh? She's sure a cutey."
"One o' the nicest gents I know. Always has a good tale."
translations.zh: 「在下認識的最好的人之一，總有好故事可說。」

translations.en: "A good, hard worker, that man. Has quite a strong grip too."
translations.zh: 「那人是個勤奮的好工人，而且握力相當驚人。」

translations.en: "Well, if that's all you need, goodbye."
He sticks a finger in his ear and shakes it. "What?"
translations.zh: 他將手指插入耳中搖晃了一下。「什麼？」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
"Suit yourself."
"I'll sell you a sack of flour for 4 gold. Is that okay?"
translations.zh: 「在下以4金賣汝一袋麵粉，可好？」

translations.en: "You look pretty full to me."
"Excellent!" $N hands over the flour.
"You can't afford it."
"Suit yourself."
"I'd buy some grain, if you had any."
"Which of you?"
"Suit yourself."
"But ya don't have any grain!"
$N turns to $Y, and says "I'll pay you 3 crowns for that sack of grain, ok?"
translations.zh: $N轉向$Y，說：「那袋穀物3金，汝肯賣嗎？」

translations.en: "Done!" He hands $Y 3 gold pieces and takes the sack.
translations.zh: 「成交！」他遞給$Y 3枚金幣，取走袋子。

translations.en: "Suit yourself."

translator_notes: 104 Grison: 鴉爪鎮麵粉磨坊主，滿身麵粉，口頭禪是吐灰「呸」。賣麵粉買穀物。童年時與提默是老友。
